subject: Vespera Tertius Ashenward City
fact: CHAR_alaric_morn was stopped at Ashenward City perimeter by CHAR_seren_malkor and CHAR_severan_duskward after a dock-runner report linked a Cinderwake crew death to a sealed Imperial order and escalating unnatural interference; guards conveyed that a warding relic aboard the Cinderwake must be secured before docking.
